case_title: JESUS BERRIOS VS. PAUL KAMADULSKI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-06-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-02-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
